title: [non-submission] CPU fallback for the poors (non-CUDA non-MLX)
author: jordankzf

data.description: CPU fallback support for non-CUDA/non-MLX environments by making device auto-detection choose CPU instead of raising an error.
Added guards around CUDA/accelerator-specific features such as torch.compile, fused Adam, flash SDP, DDP, torch.cuda.synchronize(), and nvidia-smi.
Made autocast use device.type dynamically instead of hardcoding 'cuda'.
Added MAX_VAL_TOKENS environment variable to truncate the validation set for faster local iteration.

novel_contributions: CPU fallback for training on machines without CUDA or MLX
Conditional handling of CUDA-specific training optimizations and utilities
MAX_VAL_TOKENS environment variable for faster validation iteration
